reviews.comment:
un desastre mala atencion t noche 20 min de espera atendio 2 autos ...playero con celular poniendo musica me atiende no saluda no despide absolutamente nada cero trato con el publico

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, terrible service, 20-minute wait, only two cars served... the attendant was on his cell phone playing music when he served me, didn't greet me, didn't say goodbye at all, zero customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeU5MODh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
